title: I would like a version of the Desktop App for Linux (specifically Ubuntu)
excerpt: Many people use Linux and running the Monday.com app through Wine is hit or miss (mostly miss). I’d like to see a fully functional desktop app for Linux.

posts.author: AlainG (Alain Gyger)
posts.cookedHtml: Many people use Linux and running the Monday.com app through Wine is hit or miss (mostly miss). I’d like to see a fully functional desktop app for Linux.
